description.value: > Solitude Associated Domain: Protection. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the resistant touch ability of the Protection domain. Taboo (Su) When a creature touches you or strikes you with a melee attack, you can activate this power as an immediate action. That creature takes a â1 penalty on saving throws for 1 minute. This penalty increases by 1 for every 5 levels you possess. When you use this ability, you lose your resistance bonus granted by the Protection domain for 1 minute. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier. Replacement Domain Spells: 2ndâ silence, 4thâ detect scrying, 5thâ mirage arcana, 9thâ create demiplane (greater).
